author: codex

patch.value: Audit repository for additional security, correctness, quality, and release issues

Perform a code- and configuration-level audit beyond the reported GitHub items: dependency hygiene, unsafe logging or secret handling, filesystem/network boundaries, output contracts, test gaps, type safety, workflow permissions, packaging, documentation drift, and release automation. Fix actionable findings in this tranche and document any intentionally deferred roadmap work as child items.

Static checks and targeted source review cover security-sensitive and user-facing boundaries.; Every confirmed actionable finding is either fixed with evidence or captured as a detailed pm child item.; No secrets, cache, temporary, or generated-only artifacts are committed.

message: Track broad repository audit and follow-through

author: codex

value.author: codex
value.text: Audit evidence: full release gate passes after date-version sync; coverage run reports 888 pass and 177 credential-dependent E2E skips; code and secret scanning APIs were clear at orientation; npm audit is zero.

value.author: codex
value.text: ESLint 10 surfaced three dead initial assignments; simplifying them preserved behavior and kept the stronger rule enabled.

message: Attach broad audit and verification evidence
